GeneralDescription.SourceString: A sweet tastemaker who knows all the buzz.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: A sweet tastemaker who knows all the buzz.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: Nature is so beautiful, isn't it? And Lavendra is here to see ALL of it: every tree, every flower, every slavering Underworld wolf... okay, maybe nature is sometimes more intimidating than it is beautiful...
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: Nature is so beautiful, isn't it? And Lavendra is here to see ALL of it: every tree, every flower, every slavering Underworld wolf... okay, maybe nature is sometimes more intimidating than it is beautiful...
